user.title: Add Samsung Appliance
user.description: Enter the IP address of your Samsung appliance on the local network. {reuse_note}

data_description.host: Local IP address of your Samsung appliance (e.g. 192.168.1.50).
data_description.cert_pem: The PEM-encoded client certificate used to authenticate with the appliance. Paste the full contents including the BEGIN/END CERTIFICATE header and footer.
data_description.key_pem: The PEM-encoded private key matching the certificate above. Paste the full contents including the BEGIN/END PRIVATE KEY header and footer.

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the device. Verify the IP address is reachable and the certificate and key are correct.
error.unknown: Unexpected error. Check the Home Assistant logs for details.
